response:
<<palindrome puzzle>>  

module 1: identify the initial URL to replace  
the initial URL is http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1.  

module 2: calculate the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous URL  
the sum of the squares of the digits of http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1 is 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 25 + 36 + 49 + 100 + 121 = 362.  

module 3: generate the sequence of URLs for each year from 13 to 19  
the URL at age 14 is http://yahoo.com/abc1, at age 15 is http://yahoo.com/def2, at age 16 is http://yahoo.com/ghi3, at age 17 is http://yahoo.com/jkl4, at age 18 is http://yahoo.com/mno5, and at age 19 is http://yahoo.com/pqr6.  

module 4: validate that each URL adheres to the rule  
each URL is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous URL.  
player
